author: taco-devs
title: Issue.detail: dict[str, Any] — Stringly-Typed God Field
notes: detail field is indeed dict[str,Any] serving 12+ detector shapes across 34 prod files / ~115 access sites. No systematic type narrowing exists. However, Issue.detector acts as an implicit discriminant, and this is a common pragmatic Python pattern for internal tools. Numbers overstated (115 not 200+, 34 not 36+ files). Real but well-understood trade-off.
